blurb: London-founded voice-agent company. Launch coverage uses verified compliance documentation and checked-empty role status.

publications.title: Compliance — PolyAI Platform
publications.summary: PolyAI documentation states its platform compliance posture, including GDPR-relevant controls for enterprise voice agents. It is lower-cost evidence than a policy paper, but it is first-party and directly relevant to regulated AI deployment.

notes: launch_harvest 2026-06-27: PolyAI Greenhouse board polyai verified reachable with 10 jobs; status=checked_empty for policy/compliance/legal roles at fetch time.
